member.name: M:Tsumugi.Service.Chart.CalcEarnings(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{Tsumugi.Service.Transaction})
member.summary: Calculates the earnings of the last 30 months

member.name: M:Tsumugi.Service.Chart.CalcSpendings(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{Tsumugi.Service.Transaction})
member.summary: Calculates the spendings of the last 30 months

member.name: M:Tsumugi.Service.Password.HashSHA256(System.String)
member.summary: Hashes a password with the SHA256 algorithm.

member.name: M:Tsumugi.Service.Password.Verify(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compares a password and hash value.
member.returns: True if both hash values are equal.

member.name: P:Tsumugi.Service.TsumugiUser.IsLoggedOn
member.summary: Checks if a user is logged on

member.name: P:Tsumugi.Service.TsumugiUser.UserID
member.summary: Saves the userID in the session
